---
title: "awesome-llamas"
date: '2024-07-25'
categories: [project, ai, llms]
github_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/awesome-llamas"
project_url: "https://github.com/lawwu/awesome-llamas"
image: "https://opengraph.github.com/repo/lawwu/awesome-llamas"
stars: 18
project_lang: ""
---

A curated list of resources for LLaMA 1 and LLaMA 2 — models, tools, fine-tuning guides, and community projects. Inspired by the awesome-* format.

[View on GitHub →](https://github.com/lawwu/awesome-llamas)
